articles.title: Live PR Health Report
articles.summary: Auto-regenerated daily: PR backlog aging, stalled decisions, duplicate PRs, contributor load, and triage recommendations from live GitHub data.

articles.title: PR Deep Analysis
articles.summary: A one-time deep dive into the open-PR backlog: what is actually stuck, why, and which levers would move the most PRs.

articles.title: PR Orientation
articles.summary: A new-contributor's map of the PR landscape: where to start, what review culture to expect, and how decisions get made.

articles.title: Test Health — Flaky-Test Deep Dive
articles.summary: Every flaky test across 466 daily-CI runs classified by failure mode and root cause — plus a follow-up: 3 deflake PRs shipped upstream, and what the data got wrong.

updates.text: Test Health follow-up: 3 deflake PRs shipped upstream (4156, 4157, 4158), verification methodology, and corrections
